title: Sorting with Multiple Y data points
excerpt:
Hello, 
A lot of my charts are based on a bunch of data points, meaning I place a bunch of columns into the Y axis. I would love the ability to sort via multi-column y axis. Similar to how the board allows me to sort by …

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
A lot of my charts are based on a bunch of data points, meaning I place a bunch of columns into the Y axis. I would love the ability to sort via multi-column y axis. Similar to how the board allows me to sort by multiple columns, allow me to select which columns to sort by on the y axis.

Thank you!
